name: Code Index
description: Per-workspace activity + symbol index built from Claude Code tool-use. MCP tools for find/hot/related queries.
author: contex

actions.name: find
actions.description: Find symbol by name. Params: { name: string, kind?: string, limit?: number }

actions.name: hot
actions.description: Top hot files or top symbols in a file. Params: { path?: string, limit?: number }

actions.name: related
actions.description: Files co-touched with this one. Params: { path: string, limit?: number }

actions.name: stats
actions.description: Index health and counts. No params.

actions.name: backfill
actions.description: Replay transcripts into index. Params: { transcriptPath?: string, days?: number }
